Home.hero_title:
Taste the Heritage.
Feel the Culture.
Home.hero_desc: Proudly representing the true taste of Maharashtra across India and the globe. Premium authentic Maharashtrian delicacies, crafted with love.
Home.faral_desc: Crispy Chakli, golden Karanji, and spicy Chivda perfectly crafted for your celebrations.
Home.spices_desc: Hand-pounded, sun-dried, and traditionally blended spices that bring the fiery soul of Maharashtra to your kitchen.
Home.sweets_desc: Melt-in-mouth Puran Poli, Modaks, and Ladoos made with pure A2 ghee, organic jaggery, and generations of love.
Home.essentials_desc: Wholesome flours, rustic pickles, and fiery chutneys to complete your everyday Maharashtrian meal.
Home.story_title: A Taste of Home, No Matter Where You Roam
Home.story_p1: Many Maharashtrians travel far from home, settling in other cities across India or crossing oceans. But the heart always yearns for the taste of Aai's (mother's) handmade Puran Poli, the fiery kick of Kolhapuri masala, or the satisfying crunch of Diwali Faral.
Home.story_p2: Aadaksha was born from this exact emotion—to proudly represent Maharashtrian food in India and bridge the miles for those abroad. We bring you the most authentic, traditionally crafted Maharashtrian delicacies, straight from the rural villages of Maharashtra to your doorstep. Every bite is a memory, every aroma is a journey home.

Explore.subtitle: A Culinary Journey
Explore.title: Explore Maharashtra
Explore.description: Every district has a story. Every recipe holds a legacy. Travel through the diverse landscapes of Maharashtra through its most authentic flavors.

konkan.name: Konkan Coast
konkan.title: The Coastal Heritage
konkan.description: Stretching along the Arabian Sea, the Konkan region is famous for its abundant use of coconut, kokum, and the fiery Malvani Masala. Home to the world-renowned Alphonso mangoes and cashews.

desh.name: Desh & Kolhapur
desh.title: The Cultural & Fiery Heartland
desh.description: The cultural capital blending subtly sweet flavors with unabashedly spicy cuisine. The birthplace of aromatic Goda Masala, crispy Bakarwadi, and the legendary Kolhapuri Masala.

khandesh.name: Khandesh
khandesh.title: The Rustic North
khandesh.description: A hot and dry region that produces some of the most intense and smoky flavors. Famous for its Kala Masala, peanut-based curries, and perfectly crisp Udad papads.

marathwada.name: Marathwada
marathwada.title: The Heartland Heritage
marathwada.description: A deeply historical region offering rustic, hearty meals. Famous for its Jowar Bhakris, Hurda parties, and rich peanut and garlic-based chutneys.

vidarbha.name: Vidarbha
vidarbha.title: The Eastern Spice Route
vidarbha.description: Known for the famously fiery Saoji cuisine and the citrusy sweetness of Nagpur oranges. A land of intense curries and unique festive dishes.
